name: satc-withholding
description: Project a household's full-year federal withholding and recommend a W-4 line-4c adjustment, through the SATC app's local API. Stateless compute; no client PII.

base_url.title: SATC app URL
base_url.description: Where the running SATC desktop app is listening (it prints this on startup).

tools.name: satc_withholding_meta
tools.description: Accepted filing statuses, pay frequencies, default tax year, and field guide (read-only). Call first.

tools.name: satc_read_paystub
tools.description: Parse pasted paystub text into labeled figures (read-only, on-device).

tools.name: satc_estimate_withholding
tools.description: Full-year federal withholding projection + W-4 line-4c recommendation (stateless compute).
